name: Yellow-breasted Bunting
threats: Massive trapping for food in China
conservationEfforts: China banned hunting and trade in 2017. BirdLife International raised awareness of the crisis. Enforcement of hunting bans in key migration stopover sites.
description: Once among the most abundant songbirds in Eurasia, numbering in the hundreds of millions. Considered a delicacy in southern China, it has suffered a 90% population crash in just 20 years.
